title: Brand-to-Server Mapping
description: Maps MCP server namespace identifiers to Azure brand names, short names, filenames, and optional merge-group configuration for multi-namespace services.

brandName.description: Official Azure product brand name (e.g. 'Azure Cosmos DB').

mcpServerName.description: MCP CLI namespace identifier (e.g. 'cosmos'). Must be unique across the array.

shortName.description: Abbreviated display name used in generated docs (e.g. 'Cosmos DB').

fileName.description: Base filename for generated markdown (e.g. 'azure-cosmos-db'). No extension.

mergeGroup.description: Group identifier for multi-namespace merge (e.g. 'azure-monitor'). All entries sharing a mergeGroup are merged into a single article.

mergeOrder.description: Position within the merge group. 1 = primary namespace.

mergeRole.description: Role in the merge group. 'primary' owns frontmatter/overview; 'secondary' contributes tool sections only.
